sentences.arabic: يَنْجَذِبُ الكَثِيرُ مِنَ السُيَّاحِ إِلَى المَعَالِمِ المَشْهُورَةِ، لَكِنَّ السِحْرَ الحَقِيقِيَّ يَقْبَعُ غَالِباً فِي الأَمَاكِنِ غَيْرِ المَطْرُوقَةِ وَالأَزِقَّةِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi turisti su privučeni poznatim znamenitostima, ali prava magija često leži u neistraženim mjestima i starim uličicama.
sentences.translationEn: Many tourists are attracted to famous landmarks, but the real magic often lies in off-the-beaten-path places and old alleys.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَبْتَعِدُ المَرْءُ عَنِ الزِحَامِ، يَكْتَشِفُ جَوَاهِرَ خَفِيَّةً تَعْكِسُ نَبْضَ الحَيَاةِ اليَوْمِيَّةِ لِلسُكَّانِ المَحَلِّيِّينَ.
sentences.translation: Kada se čovjek udalji od gužve, otkriva skrivene dragulje koji odražavaju puls svakodnevnog života lokalnog stanovništva.
sentences.translationEn: When one moves away from the crowds, they discover hidden gems that reflect the pulse of the daily life of local residents.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ، يُمْكِنُ تَذَوُّقُ الأَطْبَاقِ التَقْلِيدِيَّةِ فِي مَطَاعِمَ صَغِيرَةٍ لَمْ تَدْخُلْ بَعْدُ فِي كُتُيبَاتِ السِيَاحَةِ العَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tamo je moguće probati tradicionalna jela u malim restoranima koji još nisu ušli u svjetske turističke brošure.
sentences.translationEn: There, it is possible to taste traditional dishes in small restaurants that have not yet entered international tourism brochures.

sentences.arabic: التَجَوُّلُ فِي هَذِهِ المَنَاطِقِ يَمْنَحُ المَسَافِرَ فُرْصَةً لِبِنَاءِ ذِكْرَيَاتٍ فَرِيدَةٍ لَا تُنْسَى.
sentences.translation: Lutanje ovim područjima pruža putniku priliku da izgradi jedinstvene i nezaboravne uspomene.
sentences.translationEn: Wandering through these areas gives the traveler a chance to build unique and unforgettable memories.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِانْغِمَاسَ فِي التَفَاصِيلِ البَسِيطَةِ لِلْمُدُنِ هُوَ مَا يَجْعَلُ لِلسَفَرِ مَعْنًى ثَقَافِيّاً وَفِكْرِيّاً بَعِيدَ المَدَى.
sentences.translation: Uranjanje u jednostavne detalje gradova je ono što putovanju daje dalekosežan kulturni i intelektualni smisao.
sentences.translationEn: Immersing oneself in the simple details of cities is what gives travel a far-reaching cultural and intellectual meaning.
